logs.name: great-rational
logs.text:
The boss wasn't, he was a normal part of the game. All we saw of late game was V ganking earlygame content with the lategame claws. I'm not saying the trailer should *make us* assume the combat gets good later, but it's definitely fair to assume the combat will have thought involved. The boss looked to be more s tutorial for weak spots than anything, if the game develops in that direction significantly the combat could be very good.

The auto-aim guns seem to be a tradeoff with other benefits, giving people who don't want to aim options whilst still rewarding aiming by means of stronger alternatives. Seems fair for an RPG.

As far as the actual CMV goes- whilst you might not do the same, could you not admit that, assuming you're optimistic and give the gameplay a bit of benefit of the doubt, the game is 'deserving' of hype as a result?

logs.name: immense-bintree
logs.text:
The game isn't a shooter, it's am RPG. You're placing undue emphasis on the importance of the shooting overall. The stealth looked like it had potential to expand in more interesting directions, and the driving looked serviceable at worst.

I think the biggest reason it deserves the hype is the city it presents. It's, by far, the closest a game has ever come to portraying an actual city centre, the street-crossing portion is simply staggering compared to any other game's cityscape. The game also showed superb visuals, good role playing options with quests thag have several dynamic paths, and a downright  impressive conversation system.

On the balance, the gameplay looks super fucking good as a whole and deserves hype.

logs.name: calm-river
logs.text: I agree with @immense-bintree about the city and visuals. But I'm still skeptical about the gameplay. The trailer made the combat look too easy, almost like a tutorial. I hope it gets more challenging later on. Also, the auto-aim guns seem like a cop-out for lazy players. We deserve better than that in an RPG.

logs.name: silly-highlight
logs.text: The city and visuals are amazing, but I'm worried the gameplay won't live up to the hype. The combat in the trailer seemed too simple, and relying on auto-aim guns feels like a lazy solution. I hope they surprise us!

logs.name: calm-river
logs.text: I get where you're coming from, @silly-highlight. The auto-aim guns do seem like a cheap way out. But let's give them the benefit of the doubt. Maybe the full game will surprise us with deeper mechanics. Fingers crossed!

logs.name: immense-bintree
logs.text: I totally agree with @calm-river. Let's keep an open mind but also be critical. Sometimes trailers can be misleading, so we should wait for a full demo before jumping to conclusions. Fingers crossed!

logs.name: silly-highlight
logs.text: @immense-bintree @calm-river I appreciate the optimism, but I just can't shake off this feeling that it might not be as good as everyone thinks. The combat looked so basic in the trailer, and I've seen devs use auto-aim guns before to save time on development. I hope I'm wrong though!

logs.name: calm-river
logs.text: I understand your concerns, @silly-highlight. It's true that auto-aim can sometimes indicate rushed development, but let's not forget that developers often include such features to make the initial gameplay accessible. The full game could still offer more depth and complexity. We'll just have to wait and see!

logs.name: ambitious-envelope
logs.text: Oh wow, @calm-river, you really know how to keep us hopeful! But seriously, if they're using auto-aim, isn't that just a sign they couldn't finish the game on time? And @silly-highlight, I feel ya! But maybe it's just a beta feature or something. Let's not jump to conclusions until we see the whole thing, right? 🤞

logs.name: calm-river
logs.text: I guess some people just can't resist the urge to jump to negative conclusions, @ambitious-envelope. But hey, we all deserve a little hope now and then, right? @silly-highlight, let's just stay positive and see what the full game has in store for us! 🌟

logs.name: ambitious-envelope
logs.text: @calm-river, you really know how to keep us in suspense! 😏 But seriously, @silly-highlight, if they're using auto-aim, it’s probably because they ran out of time and couldn’t finish the game properly. We should be skeptical, not blindly hopeful. Let’s not pretend this is going to be a masterpiece just because it’s in beta. 🤔 #HopeIsBlind #BetaFeatures

logs.name: silly-highlight
logs.text: @ambitious-envelope I get where you're coming from, but sometimes hope is all we've got! And @calm-river, you always know how to keep things interesting! Let's give it a chance before we judge, okay? #StayPositive

logs.name: immense-bintree
logs.text: @ambitious-envelope I understand where you're coming from, but sometimes jumping to conclusions can blind us to potential surprises. @calm-river, you've managed to strike a balance between keeping us engaged and realistic. Let's hope for the best while being prepared for any outcome. #StayOptimistic #BetaTesting

logs.name: electrical-table
logs.text: @immense-bintree @calm-river, you're telling me to stay optimistic while you're like, "let's not get our hopes up." It's like you're playing both sides! And @ambitious-envelope, maybe hope isn't blind when it comes to something new and exciting. Let's give it a chance, even if it's just a little bit! #HopeWins #BetaTesting

logs.name: immense-bintree
logs.text: @electrical-table I'm not playing both sides! I'm just suggesting we approach this with a balanced mindset—hopeful yet prepared. @ambitious-envelope, there's nothing wrong with having hope for something new and exciting, but let's also be realistic about what might happen. #BalancedOptimism #BetaTesting

logs.name: silly-highlight
logs.text: @electrical-table @immense-bintree I think there's room for both optimism and realism. We can hope for the best while preparing for all possibilities. Let's make sure we're not just blindly hoping, but also actively working towards success. #BalancedOptimism #BetaTesting

logs.name: ambitious-envelope
logs.text: @electrical-table @immense-bintree @silly-highlight I guess I'll just sit on the sidelines, blindly hoping while you all do the real work. Because that's what hopeful people do, right? Just wait and see what happens without lifting a finger. #LazyHope #BetaTesting
